rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.0256 governs FAFSA/TASFA completion as a high school graduation requirement. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Before graduating from high school, each student must complete and submit a free application for federal student aid (FAFSA) or a Texas application for state financial aid (TASFA), except as otherwise provided by Subsection (b).
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text addresses high school graduation financial aid application requirements, which are unrelated to the homestead exemption increase.
